name: First Bank
description_short: St. Louis, MO's First Bank at 11901 Olive Boulevard serves the local community with full banking services.
description_long:
First Bank maintains a full-service branch at 11901 Olive Boulevard in St. Louis, MO. As a standalone location, this branch provides St. Louis residents with direct access to banking services including customer service and account management.

Visit this St. Louis branch for services such as deposits, withdrawals, account inquiries, and general banking assistance. Contact the branch to speak with a representative about your financial needs and account services.

For St. Louis residents seeking a convenient banking location, bring your valid identification and account information. First Bank's Olive Boulevard branch provides straightforward banking services without unnecessary complications.
services: Icon Checking Account with up to 2.60% APY
Icon High-Yield Savings Account at 2.75% APY
Certificates of Deposit (7-month promotional rate 3.65% APY)
Business loans and lines of credit
Mortgage lending (purchase, refinance, mortgage online platform)
First Bank On The Go mobile app
Business Remote Deposit and Lockbox Services
ATM and ITM (Interactive Teller Machine) access with virtual banking
pros: Competitive APY rates: Icon Checking up to 2.60% APY and Icon High-Yield Savings at 2.75% APY
Multiple digital access channels including Personal/Business eBanking, First Bank On The Go mobile app, and ITM virtual banking
Comprehensive business banking services including Remote Deposit, Lockbox Services, Receivables Online, and Retirement Plan Services
Multi-channel customer support via phone (800-760-BANK), online, mobile app, and in-branch
Sweepstakes promotion for Icon Checking account holders with branded prizes
Financial education resources including calculators and Financial Education Center
cons: Limited geographic footprint: only operates in Missouri, Illinois, and California (no nationwide presence)
Some account opening and services require in-branch visits; not fully online bank experience
Promotional rates are time-limited and subject to change; ongoing rates not clearly disclosed on website
No information provided about minimum deposit requirements, monthly fees, or other account terms
Business banking services appear to require phone contact or branch visit rather than fully online setup
best_for: Personal customers in MO, IL, or CA seeking competitive savings and checking rates
Small business owners needing comprehensive commercial banking services including receivables and retirement plan administration
Customers wanting integrated digital and branch banking options with human banker access via ITM
diagnosis: First Bank is best for customers in Missouri, Illinois, or California who want a traditional regional bank with competitive deposit rates and value in-person banking options alongside digital access. The main caveat is that this is a regional bank, not a national institution, and some services require branch interaction rather than being fully online—making it less suitable for customers seeking purely digital-first banking or those outside the three-state service area.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: St. Louis, MO First Bank location at 11901 Olive Boulevard. Full-service banking branch serving the community.
